sections.title: Release Header
sections.promptHint: Output 'FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE' (or 'EMBARGOED UNTIL [DATE]' if a release date was provided). Then the headline in bold — present tense, active voice, specific. Optionally add a one-line subheadline.

sections.title: Lead Paragraph
sections.promptHint: Start with: [CITY, State, Date] — Then write a single paragraph (3–4 sentences) answering who, what, when, where, and why. This paragraph must stand alone — a reader who only reads this should get the full story.
sections.ragQuery: announcement news launch product partnership funding company

sections.title: Body
sections.promptHint: 2–3 additional paragraphs expanding on the lead. Include: background context, key details of the announcement, supporting facts or metrics, and how this benefits customers or the market. Most important details first.
sections.ragQuery: product features benefits metrics impact details context

sections.title: Executive Quote
sections.promptHint: One quote from the company executive spokesperson. The quote must add perspective or human context not already in the body — not restate facts. Sound like a real person said it. Format: "[Quote]," said [Name], [Title] of [Company].

sections.title: About [Company]
sections.promptHint: A 2–3 sentence boilerplate 'About' paragraph: what the company does, who it serves, when it was founded (if known), and one key differentiator. This is reused on every press release.
sections.ragQuery: company overview mission founded customers differentiator

sections.title: Media Contact
sections.promptHint: Output a contact block with: 'Media Contact:' as the heading, then: [CONTACT NAME], [TITLE], [COMPANY], [EMAIL], [PHONE]. Use these placeholder values if the information was not provided. End the document with '###'.
